title: Cookie Dough
description: Long for the taste of warm crumbly cookies? Smooth on a little pocked-sized lip oil with the sweet scent of carob resinoid and vanilla absolute.
ingredients: Ricinus Communis Seed Oil (Organic Castor Oil)
Simmondsia Chinensis Seed Oil (Organic Jojoba Oil)
Prunus Amygdalus Amara Kernel Oil (Almond Essential Oil)
Fragaria Ananassa Seed Oil (Cold Pressed Strawberry Seed Oil)

images.alt: Cookie Dough. A smudged swatch of luscious, soft, light caramel-coloured solid lip oil.

A close-up shot shows a hand holding a gold compact mirror. The reflection shows a model's lips while applying Lush 'Cookie Dough' lip balm. The background features light blue bathroom tiles and a glimpse of green foliage.

A close-up, profile shot of a model applying Lush 'Cookie Dough' lip oil to their lips. They have dark hair in braids and are wearing a thin silver chain necklace. The background consists of pale blue bathroom tiles.
A close-up image shows a model applying the Lush 'Cookie Dough' lip oil to their lips. They have dark hair styled in braids and are looking upwards and to the side.

A person's hand reaches into a beige, fleecy makeup bag to retrieve a black tube of Lush 'Cookie Dough' lip oil. They are wearing a white top and a delicate silver bracelet, with a bathroom sink and light blue tiles in the background.
